questions.hindi: मुझे रोज़ ऑफिस जाना पड़ता है।
questions.english: I have to go to office every day.
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Subject + has to/have to + base verb (external obligation/necessity)
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "I have to go to office every day."

questions.hindi: उसे यह काम पूरा करना पड़ता है।
questions.english: He has to complete this work.
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Subject + has to/have to + base verb (external obligation/necessity)
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "He has to complete this work."

questions.hindi: हमें नियमों का पालन करना पड़ता है।
questions.english: We have to follow the rules.
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Subject + has to/have to + base verb (external obligation/necessity)
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "We have to follow the rules."

questions.hindi: उसे रोज़ जल्दी उठना पड़ता है।
questions.english: She has to wake up early every day.
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Subject + has to/have to + base verb (external obligation/necessity)
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "She has to wake up early every day."

questions.hindi: क्या तुम्हें यह करना पड़ता है?
questions.english: Do you have to do this?
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Subject + has to/have to + base verb (external obligation/necessity)
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "Do you have to do this?"

questions.hindi: उसे बहुत मेहनत करनी पड़ती है।
questions.english: He has to work very hard.
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Subject + has to/have to + base verb (external obligation/necessity)
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "He has to work very hard."

questions.hindi: मुझे यह पैसे देने पड़ते हैं।
questions.english: I have to pay this money.
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Subject + has to/have to + base verb (external obligation/necessity)
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "I have to pay this money."

questions.hindi: हमें फॉर्म भरना पड़ता है।

questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "We have to fill the form."

questions.hindi: तुम्हें ऐसा नहीं करना पड़ता (जरूरी नहीं है)।
questions.english: You do not have to do this.
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Subject + has to/have to + base verb (external obligation/necessity)
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "You do not have to do this."
